scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run render:primitive-geometry-audit && node ./node_modules/vue-tsc/bin/vue-tsc.js && node ./node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build
scripts.build:web: npm run build:wasm && npm run render:primitive-geometry-audit && node ./node_modules/vue-tsc/bin/vue-tsc.js && node ./node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build
scripts.build:wasm: npm run generate:blueprint-schema && cd rts-sim-wasm && wasm-pack --log-level error build --release --target web --out-dir ../src/game/sim-wasm/pkg && if command -v wasm-opt >/dev/null 2>&1; then wasm-opt -O3 --enable-bulk-memory --enable-mutable-globals --enable-nontrapping-float-to-int --enable-simd ../src/game/sim-wasm/pkg/rts_sim_wasm_bg.wasm -o ../src/game/sim-wasm/pkg/rts_sim_wasm_bg.wasm; else echo "wasm-opt not found; skipping wasm optimization"; fi
scripts.build:wasm:dev: cd rts-sim-wasm && wasm-pack --log-level error build --dev --target web --out-dir ../src/game/sim-wasm/pkg
scripts.tauri:dev: npm run build:wasm:dev && npx tauri dev
